pattern_detection_summary.trigger: User reported 'Disconnected, timeout' error despite passing connection test
pattern_detection_summary.task_type: Real-time WebSocket communication with Redis fallback
pattern_detection_summary.tdd_factor: Partial - basic connection tested but not end-to-end UI state

task_context.original_task: WebSocket real-time connection implementation with Redis fallback

user_feedback.actual_experience: Connection test passed but UI shows timeout and disconnected state
user_feedback.corrected_solution_needed: WebSocket timeout configuration adjustment and UI state management fix

failure_analysis.root_cause: WebSocket timeout configuration mismatch between server and client
failure_analysis.gap_analysis: Basic connection test insufficient for real-world UI integration

effectiveness_metrics.calculation: (30% user success) / (90% claude confidence) * (40% tdd factor)

integration_tests: UI state consistency test across connection states

prevention_strategy.configuration_validation: Test WebSocket timeout settings in both client and server
prevention_strategy.ui_integration: Test UI components with actual WebSocket state changes
prevention_strategy.timeout_handling: Validate timeout scenarios and recovery mechanisms
